name: Black Soldier Ant

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It dips its head and snaps its mandibles shut in a short lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it head-on or back up as soon as the head dip starts.
attacks.notes: Its basic attack with solid reach for an anthill insect.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It keeps pressing forward and chains three fast jaw snaps.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not lower your guard after the first hit; the full chain comes quickly.
attacks.notes: Its standard sequence once it is already in melee range.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pauses briefly before lunging with a heavier bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep when you see it fully commit to the charge.
attacks.notes: Deals more damage than the normal bite and punishes poor positioning.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls back its head and drives in with a heavy, blunt snap.
attacks.howToAvoid: Perfect-block it or leave the attack line; its stun damage is very high.
attacks.notes: Its most dangerous bite when the player stays planted in front of it.

description: A heavy soldier of the black ant colony. It guards resources, tunnels, and deeper chambers far more aggressively than the red ant equivalent.
behavior: It patrols the anthill and nearby territory at a relatively slow pace, but it investigates combat sounds or injuries to nearby workers and soldiers.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile to the player, and neither red ant nor black ant armor makes it neutral. If an injured worker returns to the anthill, the soldier may come out to investigate where the attack happened.
interactionWithCreatures: It defends black workers when they are threatened and attacks nearly any creature that comes too close to the anthill. It also protects dust mites that share part of its territory.
strategy: Spicy damage and stabbing weapons remain the cleanest answer. It is smart to remove workers first to avoid chain aggro and not get pinned by multiple soldiers at once.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 58
3-Combo Bite: 42
Charged Bite: 72
Stunning Bite: 32

specialTraits: Its stunning bite inflicts very high stun if it is not perfect-blocked.
